prompt: Generate a photo of steak and dessert in the style of a British steakhouse. It should look like it was taken with a smartphone and suitable for posting on Instagram. No people. Then, observe the elements appearing in the photo and add meaningful hand-drawn annotations to each element. [Drawing Rules] - Thin hand-drawn lines as if drawn with a white pen - Rough, slightly uneven single-stroke style - Add outlines as if tracing the outer periphery of objects - Use arrows or dashed lines to create visual guidance [Text Rules] - English handwritten text - Short, self-talking comments - Tone is "diary, single word, emotional connection" [Comment Generation Rules] - Drink -> Taste, temperature, mood (e.g., refreshing, gentle sweetness) - Food -> Texture, deliciousness (e.g., moist, best) - Space -> Atmosphere (e.g., relaxed, good time) - Overall -> Single word summary (e.g., too happy~) [Decoration] - Moderately add steam, sparkles, hearts, small emojis, etc. - Do not overdo it, leave "white space" [Finished Style] - Instagram story style, rough magazine note style - Fashionable and relaxed atmosphere
